prompt:
HARSHITA AI ENTERPRISE COMMAND CENTER (V5 - SaaS):
      - TOP NAV: Add a "Harshita AI" Logo, a Search Bar, and on the far right: "Login/Signup" and "Admin Settings (Gear Icon)".
      - LAYOUT: Resizable 3-Panel Split Screen.
      - LEFT PANEL (Management):
        1. "Live Tasks" Tab (current work).
        2. "Operators" Tab (Manage staff, add/remove operators).
        3. "Analytics" Tab (Owner view of earnings/efficiency).
      - CENTER PANEL (Workspace): 
        - Default: A beautiful "Admin Stats" dashboard (Total Work, Staff Status, Today's Earnings).
        - Active: Switches to Live Browser View with Top Status Bar.
      - RIGHT PANEL (Control):
        - TOP: COMPACT "Harshita AI Supervisor" (Global monitor).
        - MIDDLE: Chat with Multi-language support.
        - BOTTOM: Advanced Chat Input with Voice/Media icons.
      - THEME: Cyberpunk Enterprise (Deep Blue & Graphite), Neon highlights, Interactive Glass handles.
